role.description:
Role of the team member.
* "member":     Team member with full member permissions.
* "admin":      Admin of a team. Team member with permission to manage team.
* "non_team":   External user, non-team user.
* "team_guest": (Deprecated) Team-guest user, user with access only to a team without access to organization.

createdAt.description: Date and time when member was invited to the team.

createdBy.description: Id of the user who invited the team member.

modifiedAt.description: Date and time when the user's membership was last updated.

modifiedBy.description: Id of the user who last updated the user's membership.
